description: 웹툰/애니 명장면 실사 연기. 본인 얼굴(--cref) + 장면 분해 템플릿. [SCENE_DESCRIPTION], [OUTFIT], [BACKGROUND], [ACTION], [CAMERA] 변수 치환.

variables.SCENE_DESCRIPTION: 장면 한 줄 요약 (예: 변신 시퀀스)

example.outfit: black hooded cloak, silver armor underneath, glowing rune pendant
example.background: ruined ancient temple, torch fire, swirling mist, blue moonlight
example.action: step backward, cloak unfurls, hands raised, light gathers in palms, eyes glow, energy releases
example.camera: low angle slow push-in, then 360 orbit around character, ending close-up on glowing eyes
example.mood: epic cinematic, dramatic backlighting, film grain

stages.prompt: Cinematic shot of a Korean person, [BEFORE_OUTFIT: e.g., simple modern hoodie], standing in [BACKGROUND], soft moody lighting, neutral vulnerable expression, photorealistic film still, shot on Arri Alexa 65mm

Cinematic shot of the same Korean person, [OUTFIT: e.g., dark armor with glowing runes], standing in [BACKGROUND], dramatic backlighting, intense determined expression, glowing eyes, photorealistic film still, shot on Arri Alexa 65mm
Smooth transformation sequence: [ACTION], [CAMERA], dramatic lighting shift from soft to intense, cinematic motion blur
[ACTION climax: e.g., releases burst of energy], cape and hair flow dynamically, slow motion impact, [CAMERA: low angle to dolly out]

checklist: [0~1초] 원작 인서트 1컷 + 자막 '이 장면 기억나?' + 출처 자막 '원작: [ORIGINAL_TITLE]'
[6~13초] 액션 클라이맥스 영상 + 비트 매칭 컷
BGM: 원작 OST 패러디 또는 에픽 트레일러 BGM

stages.prompt: Extreme close-up cinematic shot of Korean person's face, [MOOD: e.g., single tear running down cheek with quivering lip], [BACKGROUND: blurred bokeh of meaningful location], rim lighting catching the tear, photorealistic film still, shot on 85mm lens shallow depth of field
Single tear slowly rolls down cheek, lip quivers, eyes blink slowly, micro-expression shift from sadness to determination, [CAMERA: very slow push-in to extreme close-up of eyes]

Mid-action shot of Korean fighter, [OUTFIT: combat outfit], wielding [WEAPON or hands raised in martial arts pose], [BACKGROUND: combat arena], dynamic motion frozen, dust particles, dramatic lighting, photorealistic film still --ar 9:16 --v 7 --s 400
Fighter executes a powerful spinning strike, dust and debris fly, [CAMERA: 180 degree orbit around the action], slow motion 60fps feel
Fighter dodges incoming attack with backflip, lands in fighting stance, [CAMERA: low angle dolly with the action], cinematic slow-mo

Cinematic shot of Korean person, [OUTFIT: simple nostalgic outfit], in [BACKGROUND: meaningful place from past], golden hour warm light, wistful expression, soft film grain, vintage color grading like Wong Kar-wai, photorealistic --ar 9:16 --v 7 --s 350
Subject turns slowly to camera, soft melancholic smile, wind catches their hair, golden light shifts, [CAMERA: slow handheld dolly with light shake], dreamlike atmosphere

production_checklist: 본인 셀카 3장 → Midjourney --cref URL 생성 (1회 등록, character-profiles.json에 저장)
원작 명장면 선정 + 30초 클립 다운로드 (1초 인서트용)
scene_archetypes 중 매칭되는 것 픽 → 변수 치환
원작 인서트 + 출처 자막 + 'AI 패러디' 명시
